# plot_montage { #neuroim.plot_montage }

```python
plot_montage(
    vol,
    axis=2,
    n_slices=16,
    cmap="gray",
    ncols=4,
    title=None,
    figsize=None,
    axes=None,
    *,
    zlevels=None,
    along=None,
    range="robust",
    probs=(0.02, 0.98),
    colorbar=False,
)
```

Show multiple world-oriented slices along one axis in a grid.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name | Type | Description | Default |
|------|------|-------------|---------|
| vol | NeuroVol or array-like | 3D volume to display. ``NeuroVol`` inputs use spatial orientation and world extents. | _required_ |
| axis | int or str | Slice axis: ``0``/``"x"``, ``1``/``"y"``, or ``2``/``"z"``. | ``2`` |
| n_slices | int | Number of evenly spaced slices when ``zlevels`` is omitted. | ``16`` |
| cmap | str, sequence, or Colormap | Matplotlib colormap or neuroim alias. | ``"gray"`` |
| ncols | int | Number of columns in the grid. | ``4`` |
| title | str | Figure title. | ``None`` |
| figsize | tuple | Figure size. Computed from panel count when omitted. | ``None`` |
| axes | array-like of Axes | Existing axes. Must contain at least the number of displayed slices. | ``None`` |
| zlevels | sequence of int | Python slice indices to display. | ``None`` |
| along | int | neuroim2-style one-based slice axis. Overrides ``axis`` when provided. | ``None`` |
| range | str or tuple | Display range: ``"robust"``, ``"data"``, or explicit ``(lo, hi)``. | ``"robust"`` |
| probs | tuple | Quantiles used for robust ranges. | ``(0.02, 0.98)`` |
| colorbar | bool | Draw a shared colorbar. | ``False`` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
|  | (fig, axes) tuple | Matplotlib Figure and grid Axes. |
